## Claim

State one claim only. Use `[TESTED]` / `[INFERENCE]` labels.

## Environment

- Browser + version:
- OS + device:
- Runtime URL:

## Model + Config

- Model A:
- Model B (if compare):
- Prompt tokens:
- Max output tokens:
- Iterations:
- Temperature:
- Cache mode:

## Evidence (required)

- [ ] Exported JSON attached
- [ ] Screenshot attached
- [ ] Prompt text (or file path) attached

## Result Summary

- Decode TPS delta:
- Throughput delta:
- Latency delta:
- TTFT delta:
- Token parity:
